mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( sns_id, sns, role, status, create_datetime ) VALUES ( #{snsId}, #{sns}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET nickname = #{nickname}, update_datetime = NOW() WHERE sns_id = #{snsId}

UPDATE member SET nickname = #{nickname}, gender = #{gender}, address = #{address}, birth_year = #{birthYear}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, tos = #{tos}, privacy_policy = #{privacyPolicy}, privacy_policy_agree_at = NOW(), third_party_policy = #{thirdPartyPolicy}, location_policy = #{locationPolicy}, update_datetime = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND sns_id = #{snsId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, sns_id, sns, nickname, gender, address, birth_year, profile_image_id, role, status, tos, privacy_policy, privacy_policy_agree_at, third_party_policy, location_policy, create_datetime, update_datetime, delete_datetime FROM member WHERE sns_id = #{snsId}
